SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventsapp.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Event extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an event in the EventsApp system. This class stores event details such as name, capacity, dates, and sampling information.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    Constructs an Event with basic information.

    Constructs a fully specified Event.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • Event

      public Event(String name, int amount)
      Constructs an Event with basic information.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the event.
      amount - The maximum capacity/amount for the event. Must not be zero.

    • Event

      public Event(String id, String name, int amount, String registration_start, String registration_end, String event_date, String description, String posterUrl, int sampleSize)
      Constructs a fully specified Event. A random UUID is assigned when id is null. null date/description/poster values are normalized to empty strings.
      Parameters:
      id - an explicit Firestore document ID, or null to auto-generate one
      name - the human-readable name of the event
      amount - the maximum number of confirmed attendees; must not be zero
      registration_start - the registration opening date in yyyy-MM-dd format
      registration_end - the registration closing date in yyyy-MM-dd format
      event_date - the date the event takes place in yyyy-MM-dd format
      description - a description of the event
      posterUrl - a URL pointing to the event's promotional poster image
      sampleSize - the number of waitlisted entrants to invite during the lottery; negative values are clamped to zero
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is zero

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the event ID.
      Returns:
      The ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the event ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID to set.

    • getAmount

      public int getAmount()
      Gets the maximum capacity/amount of the event.
      Returns:
      The amount.

    • setAmount

      public void setAmount(int amount)
      Sets the maximum capacity of the event.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to set. Must not be zero.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is zero.

      The name.

      Sets the name of the event.

      name - The name to set.

      Gets the registration start date.
      Returns:
      The start date.

      public String getRegistration_end()
      Gets the registration end date.
      Returns:
      The end date.

      public String getEvent_date()
      Gets the event date.
      Returns:
      The event date.

      public void setRegistration_start(String registration_start)
      Sets the registration start date.
      Parameters:
      registration_start - The start date to set.

    • setRegistration_end

      public void setRegistration_end(String registration_end)
      Sets the registration end date.
      Parameters:
      registration_end - The end date to set.

    • setEvent_date

      public void setEvent_date(String event_date)
      Sets the event date.
      Parameters:
      event_date - The event date to set.

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the event description.
      Returns:
      The description.

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Sets the event description.
      Parameters:
      description - The description to set.

    • getPosterUrl

      public String getPosterUrl()
      Gets the URL of the event's poster.
      Returns:
      The poster URL.

    • setPosterUrl

      public void setPosterUrl(String posterUrl)
      Sets the URL of the event's poster.
      Parameters:
      posterUrl - The URL to set.

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Gets the event location/venue.
      Returns:
      The location string.

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Sets the event location/venue.
      Parameters:
      location - The location to set.

    • getSampleSize

      public int getSampleSize()
      Gets the sample size (number of attendees to invite).
      Returns:
      The sample size.

    • setSampleSize

      public void setSampleSize(int sampleSize)
      Sets the sample size for the event lottery.
      Parameters:
      sampleSize - The size to set.

    • getWaitlistCapacity

      public int getWaitlistCapacity()
      Gets the waitlist capacity.
      Returns:
      The waitlist capacity (0 = unlimited).

    • setWaitlistCapacity

      public void setWaitlistCapacity(int waitlistCapacity)
      Sets the waitlist capacity limit.
      Parameters:
      waitlistCapacity - The capacity to set.

    • getHostId

      public String getHostId()
      Gets the ID of the user who created this event.
      Returns:
      The host user ID.

    • setHostId

      public void setHostId(String hostId)
      Sets the ID of the user who created this event.
      Parameters:
      hostId - The host user ID.

    • getHostName

      public String getHostName()
      Returns the resolved display name of the event host.
      Returns:
      The host display name, or null if not yet resolved.

    • setHostName

      public void setHostName(String hostName)
      Sets the resolved display name of the event host.
      Parameters:
      hostName - The host display name.

    • getHostProfilePictureUrl

      public String getHostProfilePictureUrl()
      Returns the resolved profile picture URL of the event host. This field is transient and not stored in Firestore; it is populated at runtime by looking up the host user document.
      Returns:
      the host's profile picture URL, or null if not yet resolved

    • setHostProfilePictureUrl

      public void setHostProfilePictureUrl(String hostProfilePictureUrl)
      Sets the resolved profile picture URL of the event host.
      Parameters:
      hostProfilePictureUrl - a Firebase Storage download URL for the host's avatar

    • isGeolocationRequired

      public boolean isGeolocationRequired()
      Whether entrants must grant location to join the waitlist.

    • setGeolocationRequired

      public void setGeolocationRequired(boolean geolocationRequired)
      Sets whether entrants must grant location permission to join the event waitlist.
      Parameters:
      geolocationRequired - true to require geolocation; false to make it optional

    • getEntrantStatus

      public String getEntrantStatus()
      Gets the entrant status for the current user (transient, not stored in Firestore).
      Returns:
      The entrant status string, or null if not set.

    • setEntrantStatus

      public void setEntrantStatus(String entrantStatus)
      Sets the entrant status for the current user (transient, used for UI display only).
      Parameters:
      entrantStatus - The status to set (e.g., APPLIED, INVITED, ACCEPTED, DECLINED, CANCELLED).

    • isFromHistory

      public boolean isFromHistory()
      Returns whether this event was loaded from the user's eventHistory (expired event).
      Returns:
      true if from history, false if from the active events collection.

    • setFromHistory

      public void setFromHistory(boolean fromHistory)
      Sets whether this event was loaded from the user's eventHistory.
      Parameters:
      fromHistory - true if loaded from history.

    • getEventDeepLink

      public String getEventDeepLink()
      Generates a deep link URL for this event, used in QR codes.
      Returns:
      The deep link URL.

    • getFormattedEventDate

      public String getFormattedEventDate()
      Returns the event date formatted as "March 27, 2026" instead of "2026-03-27". Falls back to the raw date string if parsing fails.
      Returns:
      The formatted date string, or "No date" if event_date is empty.
